title: Audit and stabilize existing work
description: Audit the existing codebase, drop and rebuild DB schema, scaffold React+Vite frontend with design system and mock data.
acceptance_criteria: Clean schema in production DB. React+Vite builds without errors. Mock contract row + detail view renders correctly. Mock opportunity row + detail view renders correctly.

title: One perfect past contract record
description: Fetch one real contract from USASpending API (PIID FA8773-24-C-0001), enrich from FPDS, insert into DB, display in UI end-to-end.
acceptance_criteria: Single real contract record in DB. All schema fields populated where available. Contract row renders in table. Click-in detail shows all fields. Nothing left on floor.

title: One perfect upcoming opportunity record
description: Fetch one real solicitation from SAM.gov API, insert into DB, display in UI end-to-end.
acceptance_criteria: Single real opportunity record in DB. Opportunity row renders. Click-in detail shows all fields. Recompete badge works if applicable.

title: LLAMA summaries
description: Pull llama3.2:3b via Ollama. Write summarize.py. Generate one-sentence summaries for the Phase 1 and Phase 2 records. Display in UI replacing placeholders.
acceptance_criteria: llama3.2:3b downloaded and running. summarize.py generates summaries. Both records have llama_summary populated. UI shows real summaries.

title: Always-on background scripts
description: Write ingest_contracts.py, enrich_fpds.py, sync_opportunities.py, summarize_batch.py. Test each with --limit 10. Set up LaunchAgents on Mac Mini.
acceptance_criteria: Each script runs with --limit 10 without errors. Progress tracked in JSON file. Resumable if interrupted. LaunchAgent entries installed.

title: Weekly dead link checker
description: Write check_links.py. Checks usaspending_alive and sam_url_alive fields. Sends weekly email via SendGrid. Logs to dead_links table.
acceptance_criteria: Script runs without errors. Dead links marked in DB. Weekly summary email generated.

title: Public read API + API key system + llms.txt + TOS
description: Build Express routes for /contracts, /opportunities, /stats. API key registration page. Rate limiting. llms.txt file. Terms of Service page.
acceptance_criteria: API returns paginated JSON with attribution meta. Rate limits enforced. API key registration works. llms.txt accessible at awardopedia.com/llms.txt. TOS page live.

title: Security hardening — rate limits, input validation, anti-scrape, headers
description: Harden the API and site against scraping, injection, abuse, and bulk data theft.
acceptance_criteria: All query params validated. Per-IP limits enforced. Security headers on all responses. Honeypot routes log and 403. No stack traces in production.

title: SEO static HTML page generation + DO Spaces + Cloudflare CDN
description: Write generate_static.py. One HTML file per contract and opportunity. Upload to DO Spaces. Sitemap submitted to Google.
acceptance_criteria: Static pages generated for all DB records. Sitemap submitted to Google Search Console.

title: Fix SAM.gov ingest pipeline — time-ordered queries + methodology doc
description: Fix sync_opportunities.py and fetch_batch.py to use time-ordered queries with no choke filters. Document repeatable ingest methodology.
acceptance_criteria: sync_opportunities.py fetches 100 active opportunities sorted by soonest deadline. fetch_batch.py query returns records (not 0). INGEST_METHODOLOGY.md written. DB has 200+ records.

title: Report generation + Stripe + PDF/CSV + caching
description: Claude-powered reports. Credit system. Stripe Checkout for credit packs. PDF + CSV via pdfkit. Report caching in DO Spaces.
acceptance_criteria: User can buy credits via Stripe. Report generated by Claude for one real record. PDF + CSV downloadable. Second purchase serves cached version.

title: Auth system stub
description: Scaffold database tables, placeholder React components, stub routes returning 501. Do not build actual auth.
acceptance_criteria: users table exists. Placeholder /dashboard and /login pages exist with 'Coming soon' content. Routes defined but return 501.
